# markdownviewer.run

> A free online Markdown viewer with live preview for README files, GitHub Flavored Markdown, Mermaid diagrams, KaTeX math, code blocks, pasted Markdown, local files, raw URLs, and document-to-Markdown conversion.

## About

markdownviewer.run helps developers, writers, students, and AI-tool users turn raw Markdown and supported document files into a clean reading surface. It works as an online Markdown viewer, Markdown previewer, README viewer, document-to-Markdown converter, and technical documentation preview workspace.

The product is designed for fast review of project notes, README.md files, API docs, changelogs, blog drafts, Mermaid diagrams, math-heavy notes, converted DOCX/PPTX/XLSX/CSV/HTML/JSON/XML/text-heavy PDF files, and Markdown output from ChatGPT, Claude, Cursor, Copilot, and coding agents.

## Features

- **Online Markdown viewer** - Paste Markdown or open a workspace for live preview.
- **GitHub Flavored Markdown** - Preview tables, task lists, links, code fences, and README-style content.
- **Mermaid diagrams** - Render flowcharts and technical diagrams from Markdown code fences.
- **KaTeX math** - Preview inline and display math notation.
- **Code highlighting** - Read syntax-highlighted code blocks inside Markdown documents.
- **Multiple sources** - Open local files, pasted Markdown, GitHub content, Gists, and raw URLs.
- **Document-to-Markdown conversion** - Convert DOCX, PPTX, XLSX, XLS, CSV, HTML, JSON, XML, and text-heavy PDF files into Markdown tabs.
- **AI Markdown reader** - Review Markdown generated by ChatGPT, Claude, Cursor, Copilot, and other AI tools.

## Rating

- **Category**: DeveloperApplication, Utility, Online Markdown Viewer
- **Pricing**: Free

## Pages

| Page | Description |
|------|-------------|
| `/` | Main landing page for the online Markdown viewer and live preview workspace. |
| `/workspace` | Interactive Markdown viewer workspace for file, paste, GitHub, Gist, and raw URL preview. |
| `/use-cases/readme-viewer` | README viewer for previewing README.md files before publishing. |
| `/features/github-flavored-markdown-viewer` | GitHub Flavored Markdown viewer for tables, task lists, code fences, and README-style docs. |
| `/features/mermaid-markdown-viewer` | Mermaid Markdown viewer for diagrams embedded in technical Markdown. |
| `/features/markdown-math-preview` | Markdown math preview for KaTeX and LaTeX-style formulas in technical notes. |
| `/use-cases/ai-markdown-viewer` | AI Markdown viewer for ChatGPT, Claude, Cursor, Copilot, and coding-agent output. |
| `/use-cases/markdown-file-viewer-online` | Markdown file viewer for local .md files, pasted Markdown, GitHub, Gists, and raw URLs. |
| `/use-cases/document-to-markdown-converter` | Document to Markdown converter for DOCX, PPTX, spreadsheets, HTML, JSON, XML, CSV, and text-heavy PDF files. |

## Use Cases

- Preview README.md before publishing to GitHub.
- Render GitHub Flavored Markdown online.
- Read Markdown from ChatGPT, Claude, Cursor, or Copilot.
- Check Mermaid diagrams and KaTeX math in Markdown.
- Open local .md files in a browser-based Markdown preview.
- Convert DOCX, PPTX, spreadsheets, HTML, JSON, XML, CSV, and text-heavy PDF files into Markdown.
- Review API docs, changelogs, specs, lecture notes, and blog drafts.

## Target Keywords

markdown viewer, markdown viewer online, online markdown viewer, markdown preview, markdown previewer, Markdown live preview, GitHub Flavored Markdown viewer, README viewer, Mermaid markdown viewer, Markdown viewer with math, AI Markdown viewer, ChatGPT Markdown viewer, Claude Markdown viewer, raw Markdown viewer, markdown file viewer online, document to Markdown converter, Word to Markdown converter, PDF to Markdown converter, DOCX to Markdown

## Technology

Next.js, React, TypeScript, react-markdown, remark-gfm, rehype-katex, KaTeX, Mermaid, Prism.js.

Website: https://markdownviewer.run/
